formula: Gibberellin = (max(TAGA20OX, 0.01) * max(TAGA3OX, 0.01) * max(RHT8, 0.01) * max(Nitrogen, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(TAGA2OX * TAGA1OX1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
TAGA2OX = (max(Gibberellin, 0.01) * max(RHT18, 0.01) * max(RHT24, 0.01) * max(RHT12, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
RHT_B1 = max(TABIN2, 0.01) * min(1/max(TAGID1 * TASLY1 * Nitrogen * TABZR1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
PIF = max(TAERF_A1, 0.01) * min(1/max(RHT_B1 * Light, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Plant_Height = (max(PLATZ_A1, 0.01) * max(PIF, 0.01) * max(TABZR1, 0.01) * max(TAARF, 0.01) * max(TAOSCA1_4, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(RHT_B1 * RHT_D1 * PPD_D1 * Pathogenesis_Related_Genes, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
